name: email-triage
description: Inbox triage with approval gate on drafts. Reads inbox, classifies each email, drafts replies for customer questions (you approve each one). Uses BetterClaw's bundled Gmail integration (gmail_search/read/draft) — for OpenClaw users without Cowork. Cowork users should compile their own Gmail-triage paragraph instead; the host's verified Gmail connector is a better fit than this preset.
example_agent_message: Triage my inbox. Search in:inbox maxResults=5, then for each read it and decide: newsletter (skip), investor (flag), or customer question (draft reply).
